CVE-2021-31684.title: A vulnerability was discovered in the indexOf function of JSONPar ...
CVE-2021-31684.summary: A vulnerability was discovered in the indexOf function of JSONParserByteArray in JSON Smart versions 1.3 and 2.4 which causes a denial of service (DOS) via a crafted web request.

CVE-2023-1370.title: [Json-smart](https://netplex.github.io/json-smart/) is a performa ...
CVE-2023-1370.summary:
[Json-smart](https://netplex.github.io/json-smart/) is a performance focused, JSON processor lib.

When reaching a ‘[‘ or ‘{‘ character in the JSON input, the code parses an array or an object respectively.

It was discovered that the code does not have any limit to the nesting of such arrays or objects. Since the parsing of nested arrays and objects is done recursively, nesting too many of them can cause a stack exhaustion (stack overflow) and crash the software.

CVE-2024-57699.title: A security issue was found in Netplex Json-smart 2.5.0 through 2. ...
CVE-2024-57699.summary: A security issue was found in Netplex Json-smart 2.5.0 through 2.5.1. When loading a specially crafted JSON input, containing a large number of ’{’, a stack exhaustion can be trigger, which could allow an attacker to cause a Denial of Service (DoS). This issue exists because of an incomplete fix for CVE-2023-1370.
